import sys
import inspect
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR

model = TSR.from_pretrained(
    '/models/triposr',
    config_name='config.yaml',
    weight_name='model.ckpt',
)

source = inspect.getsource(model.renderer.__class__._forward)
for i, line in enumerate(source.split('\n')[:60]):
    print(f"{i}: {line}")
